zh., , Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Margaret Preston於1500年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親Sir Henry Preston33歲，母親Margaret Mary Napier29歲。她於1517年與John Morrison I在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1595年7月在她的家鄉享年95歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

zh-hans., , Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Margaret Preston于1500年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲Sir Henry Preston33岁，母亲Margaret Mary Napier29岁。她于1517年与John Morrison I在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1595年7月在她的家乡享年95岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Margaret Preston was born in 1500, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, Sir Henry Preston, was 33 and her mother, Margaret Mary Napier, was 29. She married John Morrison I in 1517, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in July 1595, in her hometown, at the age of 95, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Margaret Preston est née en 1500, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Sir Henry Preston, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mary Napier, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Morrison I en 1517, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1595, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Margaret Preston 1500 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Preston 33 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mary Napier 29. Sie hat 1517 in Edinburgh, Scotland John Morrison I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1595 im Alter von 95 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Margaret Preston è nata il nel 1500 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Henry Preston, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mary Napier, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato John Morrison I nel 1517, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1595, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Margaret Prestonが1500年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Prestonは33歳，母Margaret Mary Napierは29歳であった。1517年にスコットランドエディンブルグでJohn Morrison Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1595年7月に故郷で95歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Margaret Preston(이)가 1500년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Preston(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mary Napier(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1517년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 John Morrison I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 7월 그녀의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Margaret Preston nasceu em 1500, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Henry Preston, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mary Napier, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com John Morrison I em 1517, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em julho de 1595, em sua cidade natal, com 95 anos, e foi sepultada em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Margaret Preston родилась в 1500 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Preston было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mary Napier, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Morrison I в 1517 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла июль 1595 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Margaret Preston nació en 1500, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Sir Henry Preston, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Mary Napier, tenía 29 años. Se casó con John Morrison I en 1517, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en julio de 1595, en su pueblo, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultada en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
